# Calendar Consolidator MCP

> A lightweight system to consolidate multiple calendars (Microsoft 365, iCloud/CalDAV) into a single unified calendar with one-way mirroring and incremental syncing.

## Overview

Calendar Consolidator MCP is a dual-runtime (Node.js + Python) project that:
- Connects to Microsoft 365 via Graph API and CalDAV sources
- Mirrors events one-way into a target calendar
- Performs incremental/delta sync with change detection
- Exposes an MCP server for AI/agent integration
- Provides a simple web UI for configuration

## Key Resources

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/cocodedk/calendar-consolidator-mcp)
- [Documentation](https://github.com/cocodedk/calendar-consolidator-mcp/tree/main/0-docs)

## Tech Stack

- Runtime: Node.js 20, Python 3.12
- Storage: SQLite
- Protocol: MCP (Model Context Protocol)
- Testing: Jest (Node.js), pytest (Python)
